overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through a Los Santos commercial district during golden hour. The player moves from a street intersection past a passing bus, transitions onto a sidewalk, and walks past various storefronts including a FLEECA bank and a cannabis shop.

events.description: white city bus passes from right to left across the intersection
character's hand briefly enters top of frame

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection, observing the passing bus and surrounding traffic

notable_agents.action: white city bus driving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: cluster of modern skyscrapers visible in the downtown distance
multi-story building with dark windows and parked muscle cars
large billboard with SUBURBAN text visible against the sky
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a city street intersection during golden hour, with downtown skyscrapers visible in the distance. A white transit bus passes through the intersection as the camera moves forward. The SUBURBAN billboard stands prominently on the right side of the frame.

events.description: black sedan drives past from left to right on the street
turns right onto the concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turning from the street onto the sidewalk while cars pass by on the road

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: building with green FLEECA bank signage and glass entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving along the street, the camera passes a black sedan before turning right onto the sidewalk. The FLEECA bank building comes into view on the left, while the downtown skyline fades into the background.

events.description: red SUV drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial storefronts and street furniture

entered.detail: classic ornate black street lamps along the sidewalk edge
various shop fronts with signage and metal security gates

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk, the camera moves past various commercial storefronts on the left. Street lamps line the path, and the SUBURBAN billboard remains visible in the distance to the right. A red SUV passes by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with cannabis shop and outdoor seating

events.description: approaching the White Widow cannabis shop with distinctive green facade and large marijuana leaf logo
slight turn to navigate around outdoor seating area on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past the White Widow shop and continuing along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians seated outside

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor table in front of the cannabis shop

entered.detail: green building with large white cannabis leaf logo and THC signage
tables and chairs with colorful umbrellas on the sidewalk
cars parked along the street curb including a white van

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the distinctive green White Widow cannabis shop with its large marijuana leaf signage. Pedestrians sit at outdoor tables on the sidewalk as the camera navigates around them. The setting sun creates a warm backlight, and palm trees line the street closer to the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a busy city intersection into a warm, commercial sidewalk district during golden hour. It begins at a street crossing with downtown skyscrapers in the distance, moving forward as a white transit bus passes and a SUBURBAN billboard stands to the right. As the camera passes a black sedan, it turns right onto the concrete sidewalk, causing the distant skyline to fade while a FLEECA bank building emerges on the left. The scene then progresses past a series of storefronts and street lamps, with a red SUV driving by on the adjacent road. Finally, the camera navigates around pedestrians at outdoor tables to approach the green White Widow cannabis shop, with palm trees and a warm, backlit sun defining the end of the path.
